en: You want to take the high road and sometimes it's hard but I think that at the end of the day
ko: 대인배가 되고 싶잖아. 때로는 어렵지만 결국 모든 사람은 자기만의

en: everyone has their own way of communicating and I've always been like a champion of him speaking
ko: 소통 방식이 있고 난 항상 그가 자기 진실을 말하는 걸 지지했고

en: his truth and I would always want that. To take the high road means to do what's right or most
ko: 항상 그러고 싶었어. take the high road는 쉽지 않거나 기대되지 않더라도 옳은 일을 하는 것을

en: correct even if it's not easy or exactly what's expected from you. Here she's referring to how
she reacted to the ending of her relationship with Kanye West. To be a champion of someone
ko: 그녀는 카니예 웨스트와의 관계가 끝난 것에 대한 반응을 말하고 있어. be a champion

en: means to support or defend their way of doing something. In this sentence we see many features
ko: of someone은 누군가의 행동 방식을 지지하거나 옹호하는 것을 의미해. 이 문장에서 연결 발음의

en: of connected speech. Would is contracted to d but because it's between two vowels I and A it
ko: 여러 특징을 볼 수 있어. Would는 d로 축약되는데 두 모음 I와

en: sounds like a flap T. Then the T in want is dropped and the last T in that becomes a glottal T.
ko: 그리고 want의 T가 탈락하고 that의 마지막 T가 성문 폐쇄음이 돼. 그래서

en: So what you hear is I'd always want that.
ko: 들리는 건 I'd always want that.
